author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Star Atlas CORE Act 2 - Episode 2

Limited Star Atlas CORE collectible covers for Act 2 - Episode 2 will be launching on September 13th and will only be available for two weeks!

When you snag one of these collectible covers, you'll not only gain early access to reading the episode but also unlock exclusive extra content. Listen as Tim Mcburnie explains what you can expect in the episode.
